Unable to open %s while Easy mode turned on.
"Can't use Gaming Hub in Safe mode."
"Can't add bookmark. You already have a bookmark with this name and app."
%s in Bookmarks was categorized as a game and moved to My games.
"Can't add bookmark. There's an issue with the picture."
To use bookmarks, you need to allow following permissions in settings.
Bookmark webpages, saved images, or apps that you use often while gaming. You can bookmark them here or by tapping the %s in Gallery or Samsung Internet, then tapping Gaming Hub Bookmark.
Bookmark webpages, saved images, or apps that you use often while gaming. You can bookmark them here or by tapping the Share button in Gallery or Samsung Internet, then tapping Gaming Hub Bookmark.
"Can't add bookmark. You already have a bookmark with this name and address."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Your instant plays will appear here.
"Instant Plays you've played or viewed in the last 30 days will appear here. This includes games you found by tapping the Next button."
Data is shown for the last 12 months.
"Your play records for the last 7 days have been updated. Check the play log to compare with other gamers."
You played less this week than the week before. Check out your full play history.
You played more this week than the week before. Check out your full play history.
Metrics newly added in Gaming Hub 8.0 are shown from the date that version was installed.
Play games to add to your history
Most play time in one day
Using mobile data to stream videos may result in additional charges.
Play the game to see your high score here.
Get a score of %d to move to the next percentile.
Something went wrong. Try again later.
Your play data is for this phone only
Your play data is for this tablet only
None of your friends are online
Item at position %d cannot be dragged.
"Someone's already using that nickname. Try something else."
"Can't use this nickname. Try something else."
Set a profile picture for gamer profile
To more accurately record your gameplay time, allow usage tracking.
You need to enable the Android System WebView app in Settings to complete this action.
You need to enable the YouTube app in Settings to complete this action.
failed to fetch OT banner data
Pass valid parameters to get the data
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Tap here to unmute game sound
Tap here to unmute game sound
Tap here to put all your games together for quick access, plus get info on hot games to check out.
All your games in one place
Your nickname was flagged as inappropriate and reset to your name from your Samsung account. You can set a new nickname in your gamer profile.
To access more fun features, sign in.
Try these popular games now, without downloading
This game is rated for users %d or older.
This streaming game may use a large amount of mobile data.
Discover and stream top mobile games, curated for you. No downloads. No waiting. Just tap and play instantly.
"Dive into your favorite games faster with a toolbar that makes managing games simple and keeps track of everything you've played, including Instant Plays."
Expand the toolbar to see your recent games, Your library of installed games, and the mute button.

"Discover and stream top mobile games, curated for you. No downloads. No waiting. Just tap and play instantly Dive into your favorite games faster with a toolbar that makes managing games simple and keeps track of everything you've played, including Instant Plays."
Swipe left or right on the toolbar to view your recently played games.
Character named Instant Player running instantly
To record your game play time accurately, you need to keep allowing usage tracking.
Keep allowing access to usage data?
Shake your phone and enjoy lucky of the draw with ease.
Shake your tablet and enjoy lucky of the draw with ease.
Change the background of the library to your own image.
"These features aren't officially supported, so your results may vary."
Game Booster optimizations will still work during game play.
"You'll still be able to use Galaxy game features with this game after it's removed."
Something went wrong while removing this game. Try again later.
Choose where new games will appear in your library.
Add bookmarks to see them here.
Gamer profile has been added. Try it out.
Welcome! Check out your new gamer profile.
Get notified about promotions and marketing info?
You agreed to receive %1$s marketing information on %2$s. To change this setting, go to %3$s.
Check your network connection and try again.
Play or install some games to see them here.
"Game sound will be muted, but your phone volume won't change. Unmute by pressing the Volume up or down button while playing a game."
"Game sound will be muted, but your tablet volume won't change. Unmute by pressing the Volume up or down button while playing a game."
Sign in to track your Instant Plays activity.
"Instant Plays you've played or viewed in the last 30 days will appear here."
Something went wrong while loading game data. Try again later.
Add Gaming Hub to your Home screen?
"See all the games you've played in My games."
"You haven't installed any games yet. Go to the Galaxy Store to check out some games you might like."
Games you play often will be shown here.
Tap here to change to library view.
"You've requested restriction of processing of your personal data"
You agreed to get Gaming Hub promotions and news about games on %s. To change this, go to Settings > Get promotions and news about games.
"We'll let you know about discounts, special events, and more."
You withdrew your agreement to get Gaming Hub promotions and news about games on %s. To change this, go to Settings > Get promotions and news about games.
Hide game icons on Apps screen?
Hide games on Home and Apps screens?
%1$s will not work while %2$s in %3$s is turned off. You can turn it on in Settings.
Apps that can appear on top
Link your Discord account to see what games your friends are playing.
Get notified about promotions and marketing info?
You agreed to receive %1$s marketing information on %2$s. To change this setting, go to %3$s.
Check your network connection and try again.
Switch to full screen view to share your play time.
New instant plays for you to check out.
Complete your missions to get eggs.
Hatch an egg to add a creature.
Complete missions to get eggs. Hatch the eggs to meet your creatures.
Sign in for Instant Plays. Access them from the toolbar.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Check your network connection and try again.
None of your apps can perform this action.
Choose where to get your game notifications.
To get notifications from %1$s, turn on Notification access for %2$s in Settings.
You can move game notifications from the notification panel to Gaming Hub.
Allow app to send you notifications?
To use the function, you need to allow following permission in settings.
Used to notify you about events, suggestions, and more
"Thanks for your interest. We will share more once you're back online."
"You are back online! Let's pick up where we left off"
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
"We'll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site."
Tap here to put all your games together for quick access, plus get info on hot games to check out.
All your games in one place
Mute your games, not the rest of your phone. Play in Gaming Hub for this and more cool features.
Mute your games, not the rest of your tablet. Play in Gaming Hub for this and more cool features.
Watch YouTube videos, see which games are gaining players, and more.
Get your videos, stats, and rankings
Data Retention | if applicable value displayed in days
You can still use the app’s basic functions without allowing the optional permissions
Used to notify you about events, suggestions, and more
Used to access pictures to your bookmarks
Used to share and save images and save Terms and Conditions
The following permissions are required for the app service. For optional permissions, the default functionality of the service is turned on, but not allowed.
Games to show in Gaming timeline
Sign in to see your timeline.
Character named Super user with big smile
Red monster with one eye and trident
Pink robot with wheels to move
Robot with orange and round body
Wolf monster with fangs and claws
Happy person waving pony tail and raising eyebrows
Friends and a dog fetching a bone
Character with red mask and suit
Red cyclops with horns and trident
Muscular male superhero in green suit
Bearded wizard with staff and fire ball in hand
Male villain in red skull mask and red suit
Female martial artist with long hair
To see your play history, allow access to your usage data in Settings.
Get exclusive benefits with your Galaxy.
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Open Gaming Hub again to continue.
"You requested the deletion of your personal data. Gaming Hub features that use your Samsung account won't be available until that process is complete."
Save your changes or discard them?
Swipe up or down with two finger to adjust
Data processing and sharing for marketing purposes
In Gaming Hub and the Home and Apps screens
You can request deletion of your Gaming Hub data at %1$shttps://privacy.samsung.com%2$s.
"All of your Gaming Hub data on your phone and stored by Samsung will be erased. Gaming Hub features that use your Samsung account won't be available until that process is complete."
"All of your Gaming Hub data on your tablet and stored by Samsung will be erased. Gaming Hub features that use your Samsung account won't be available until that process is complete."
Permanently erase your Gaming Hub data?
You can find out about exclusive offers and the latest features from %s and other Samsung apps by turning on Get news and special offers in Samsung account settings.
"If you turn off %1$s, you'll stop receiving news and offers not only from %2$s but also from other Samsung apps and services."
If you want to stop receiving news and special offers from all Samsung apps, go to %1$sSettings > Samsung account > Security and privacy%2$s and turn off %3$s.
Note that some Samsung apps and services have their own controls for marketing information. Those controls only affect marketing sent from those apps and services and are unrelated to this setting.
Save your play in cloud games
Cloud games will be automatically installed so you can continue where you left off.
"New cloud games won't be installed automatically. Gameplay for cloud games that have already been downloaded will be deleted, and future gameplay won't be saved."
Turn off Save your play in cloud games?
On %1$s, you withdrew your agreement to get promotions and news about games from %2$s.
On %1$s, you agreed to get promotions and news about games from %2$s.
Sign in to use your gamer profile, see your creature collection, and more.
Choose where to show your games.
Games shown in Gaming Hub and Home and Apps screens.
To use %s, tap Settings, go to App info > Permissions, then allow the following permissions:
A new version of %s is available. Update to try out the latest features.
Sign in to your Samsung account to use Gaming Hub.
Your Gaming Hub data will be erased and can’t be recovered. Your game apps will be available on the Apps screen.
Leave Gaming Hub and erase your data?
You can sign in to your Samsung account to open Gaming Hub, close Gaming Hub for now, or leave Gaming Hub and erase your Gaming Hub data.
Sign in to continue using Gaming Hub
Something went wrong. Try again later.
Close icon which dismisses Banner view
No data found to render the UI, Please initialize the SDK and try again.
Request Ad Video force in common area.
Ad(AppIcon, Video, GalaxyStore Banner) request will be ignored
Call delete data api after restore
Restore CloudGame With Open ab file
Feature control by Server will be applied
Custom feature control will be applied
Load PlayTime BackupData from json file
We connect to Development server.A specific error can occur according to the server stability characteristics. Samsung does not take any responsibility.
Oobe Never Run Hun Forced to Show
Switch mean is force open or not
"Reset Alarm Interval(min) (Warning it's a Temp value when you reboot device you need to re-set)"
Always check account required consent values
Always check account mandatory consent values without a daily cycle
"All of this application's data will be deleted permanently. This includes all files, settings, accounts, databases etc."
Games are automatically added so you can always find what you want to play.
All your games in one place
See what’s new in Instant Plays
Using mobile data to stream videos may result in additional charges.
The language code passed is not supported by the platform, Data may be returned in the default language if language code is not configured in OneTrust admin UI
Have you published the SDK_VERSION SDK data in the OneTrust portal?
Improve your ads experience with personalized ads
Get personalized ads by allowing Samsung to collect and use your personal information (optional)
"Get personalized ads by sharing your personal information with Samsung's business partners (optional)"
Get personalized ads while you use this app.
Information about your phone and app, including your phone’s identifiers such as IP address and ad ID, will be used by Samsung’s business partners who may provide the personalized ads.
Information about your tablet and app, including your tablet’s identifiers such as IP address and ad ID, will be used by Samsung’s business partners who may provide the personalized ads.
You can turn this off at any time in the app settings.
If you don’t agree, you’ll still receive the same number of ads, but they won’t be personalized.
For more information about how your data is processed, see the %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s.
Improve your ads experience with personalized ads
Whenever you install a new game, you’ll be able to find it in Gaming Hub.
Bookmark useful sites to help you play, manage your gaming time across all your devices, get special coupons and promotions, and much more.
All your games in one place
Show game apps in Gaming Hub only
Show game apps in Gaming Hub only (optional)
Check our %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s to see how we manage your data.
To continue, agree to the %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s.
By continuing, you agree to the %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s.
Check our %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s to see how we manage your data and comply with the personal Data Protection Law.
Check our %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s to see how we manage your data.
Check our %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s to see how we manage your data and comply with the Personal Data Protection Law.
By continuing, you agree to our updated %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s.
Check out our updated %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s to see how we manage your data.
By continuing, you agree to our updated %1$sTerms and Conditions%2$s.
By continuing, you agree to our updated %1$sTerms and Conditions%2$s and %3$sPrivacy Notice%4$s.
By continuing, you agree to the %1$sTerms and Conditions%2$s.
By continuing, you agree to the %1$sTerms and Conditions%2$s and %3$sPrivacy Notice%4$s.
By continuing, you agree to the %1$sTerms and Conditions%2$s and %3$sPrivacy Notice%4$s.
Your consent to the processing described below is not strictly necessary and you may refuse to provide consent and still use the service.

"We'll send you relevant news, special offers, and other information about Gaming Hub and its partners' services by email and push notifications. You can unsubscribe at any time in the Gaming Hub settings."
Use my personal information to provide promotions and news about games (optional)
To continue, agree to the following:
"Can't open %s. Delete some files or uninstall unused apps, then try again."
I agree to data processing and sharing of my special category type data.
I agree to cross-border data transfer.
I agree to get news and special offers. (optional)
I agree to the Terms and Conditions.
"You won't get rewards for viewing this ad."
